endpoints.name: Elemental monkey trio (Pansage / Pansear / Panpour line)

description: Extension pass — Pansear (Fire base, hear-no-evil) and Panpour (Water base, see-no-evil) join the elemental-monkey-trio node alongside already-wired Pansage (BUS-12), Simisage (DAA-007), Simisear (DAA-027). Corpus now covers 5 of 6 trio species; only Simipour (Water evolved) remains. Burning Shadows now hosts the entire base-form triptych (Pansage 12 + Pansear 22 + Panpour 36) — three adjacent-set Common-rarity base-form members in a single Sun-and-Moon-era set, the strongest single-set base-form coverage of any character-layer cohort on the Pokemon side.
citations: [In-corpus elemental-monkey-trio.md prior pass canonicalizing three-wise-monkeys design citation]
